creator: rotkap@gmx.de
text:
Once upon a time - there was a freeBSD community where a person, who needed help, got it..


By the way: I sent a pr für my problem. 

I did not send it to you.

Who dispatched to you - I dont know. It was a problem with ports, und I could not solve it ion my own

Okay, but for the future - I am on my own. Okay. thx for clearness..
